meta.contract: Every blank is written as {role:shape}. shape 'np' = noun phrase, 'cl' = full clause (subject + verb). roles: topic, counter, verdict, pro1/pro2/pro3, con1/con2. The engine performs a lookup only — no grammatical guessing. Question files must supply every role in every shape the cards request. Fixed 'glue' language (hooks, discourse markers, thesis starters) is wrapped in ... so the UI can highlight it; blanks are left unwrapped so filled content stays plain.

Yet it is often maintained that the key disadvantage of {topic:np} is that {con1:cl}.
cards.close: In conclusion, it is felt that the advantages of {topic:np} outweigh the disadvantages.
